zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Greystoke於大約1115年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福利斯索普時，她的父親Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke37歲，母親Agnes FitzWalter33歲。她於大約1139年與Edgar of Dunbar在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1162年之後在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Greystoke于大约1115年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾福利斯索普时，她的父亲Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke37岁，母亲Agnes FitzWalter33岁。她于大约1139年与Edgar of Dunbar在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1162年之后在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴。

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Greystoke was born about 1115, in Friesthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke, was 37 and her mother, Agnes FitzWalter, was 33. She married Edgar of Dunbar about 1139, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1162, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Greystoke est née environ 1115, à Friesthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes FitzWalter, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Edgar of Dunbar environ 1139, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1162, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Greystoke um 1115 in Friesthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke 37 und ihre Mutter Agnes FitzWalter 33. Sie hat um 1139 in Schottland, United Kingdom Edgar of Dunbar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1162 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Greystoke è nata il circa 1115 nel Friesthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Agnes FitzWalter, aveva 33 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Alice Greystokeが約1115年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフリースソルペで生まれた時，父Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystokeは37歳，母Agnes FitzWalterは33歳であった。約1139年にイギリススコットランドでEdgar of Dunbarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1162年以後にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで死去した。

ko.Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland,: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바 던바
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Greystoke(이)가 대략 1115년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 프리스소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes FitzWalter(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1139년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Edgar of Dunbar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1162년 이후 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Greystoke nasceu aproximadamente 1115, em Friesthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Agnes FitzWalter, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Edgar of Dunbar aproximadamente 1139, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1162, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland,: дунбар, дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Greystoke родилась около 1115 г. в местности фриестаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes FitzWalter, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edgar of Dunbar около 1139 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1162 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Greystoke nació aproximadamente 1115, en Friesthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Agnes FitzWalter, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Edgar of Dunbar aproximadamente 1139, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1162, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
